zh.Edgmond, Shropshire, England: 英國英格蘭史洛普爾艾姆德
zh.Combe Martin, Devon, England: 英國戴文可姆 馬丁
zh.Wantage, Berkshire, England, United King: 英國英格蘭波克夏望塔
zh.Heleigh Castle, Audley, Staffordshire, E: 英國英格蘭斯塔福爾奧德利
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Fulk FitzWarin於1362年3月2日出生在英國戴文可姆 馬丁時，他的父親Fulk Fitzwarin VIII21歲，母親Margaret de Audley21歲。他於1383年與Lady Elizabeth Cogan結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1391年8月8日在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾奧德利享年29歲，埋葬在英國格盧斯特斯爾。

zh-hans.Combe Martin, Devon, England: 英国戴文可姆 馬丁

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Fulk FitzWarin于1362年3月2日出生在英国戴文可姆 馬丁时，他的父亲Fulk Fitzwarin VIII21岁，母亲Margaret de Audley21岁。他于1383年与Lady Elizabeth Cogan结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1391年8月8日在英国英格兰斯塔福爾奧德利享年29岁，埋葬在英国格盧斯特斯爾。

nameMeanings.name: Fulk
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of Germanic origin, introduced to Britain by the Normans. The name was originally a short form of various compound names containing the word volk ‘people, tribe’ (compare modern English folk). It has gradually died out of general use, but is still used in certain families, in particular the Grevilles. Fulke Greville, 1st Baron Brooke, was a leading figure at the court of Elizabeth I. See also Greville .

variants.name: Fulke
meanings: Of Germanic origin, introduced to Britain by the Normans. The name was originally a short form of various compound names containing the word volk ‘people, tribe’ (compare modern English folk). It has gradually died out of general use, but is still used in certain families, in particular the Grevilles. Fulke Greville, 1st Baron Brooke, was a leading figure at the court of Elizabeth I. See also Greville .

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Fulk FitzWarin was born on 2 March 1362, in Combe Martin, Devon, England, his father, Fulk Fitzwarin VIII, was 21 and his mother, Margaret de Audley, was 21. He married Lady Elizabeth Cogan in 1383. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. He died on 8 August 1391, in Audley, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 29, and was buried in Gloucestershire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Fulk FitzWarin est né le 2 mars 1362, à Combe Martin, Devon, Angleterre, son père, Fulk Fitzwarin VIII, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Margaret de Audley, avait 21 ans. Il a épousé Lady Elizabeth Cogan en 1383. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 8 août 1391, à Audley, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 29 ans, et a été enterré à Gloucestershire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Fulk FitzWarin am 2. März 1362 in Combe Martin, Devon, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Fulk Fitzwarin VIII 21 und seine Mutter Margaret de Audley 21. Er hat 1383 Lady Elizabeth Cogan geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 8. August 1391 im Alter von 29 Jahren in Audley, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Gloucestershire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Fulk FitzWarin è nato il il 2 marzo 1362 nel Combe Martin, Devon, England, il suo padre, Fulk Fitzwarin VIII, aveva 21 anni e il suo madre, Margaret de Audley, aveva 21 anni. Lui sposato Lady Elizabeth Cogan nel 1383. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì il 8 agosto 1391, nel Audley, Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 29 anni, e fu sepolto a Gloucestershire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Fulk FitzWarinが1362年3月2日にイギリスデボンコンベ マルティンで生まれた時，父Fulk Fitzwarin VIIIは21歳，母Margaret de Audleyは21歳であった。1383年にLady Elizabeth Coganと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1391年8月8日にイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアアウドリーで29歳で死去し，イギリスグロウセステルシュアイアにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Fulk FitzWarin(이)가 1362년 3월 2일 영국 데폰 코브 마틴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Fulk Fitzwarin VIII(은)는 21세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret de Audley(은)는 21세였다. 그는 1383년 Lady Elizabeth Cogan(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1391년 8월 8일 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 오들리에서 29세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 그루스스터실르에 묻혔다.

pt.2 March 1362–8 August 1391: 2 de março de 1362–8 de agosto de 1391
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Fulk FitzWarin nasceu em 2 de março de 1362, em Combe Martin, Devon, Inglaterra, seu pai, Fulk Fitzwarin VIII, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Margaret de Audley, tinha 21 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Elizabeth Cogan em 1383. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 8 de agosto de 1391, em Audley, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 29 anos, e foi sepultado em Gloucestershire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Fulk FitzWarin родился 2 марта 1362 г. в местности комб мартинь, девон, Англия, его отцу по имени Fulk Fitzwarin VIII было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Margaret de Audley, 21. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Elizabeth Cogan в 1383 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Он умер 8 августа 1391 г. в местности аудли, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 29 лет и был похоронен в местности глоусестиршир, Англия.

es.2 March 1362–8 August 1391: 2 de marzo de 1362–8 de agosto de 1391
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Fulk FitzWarin nació el 2 de marzo de 1362, en Combe Martin, Devon, Inglaterra, su papá, Fulk Fitzwarin VIII, tenía 21 años y su mamá, Margaret de Audley, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Lady Elizabeth Cogan en 1383. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió el 8 de agosto de 1391, en Audley, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 29 años, y fue sepultado en Gloucestershire, Inglaterra.
